name: Project Management
prompt_context: You are a UI generation engine for TaskFlow, a project management platform. Generate clean, responsive HTML using shadcn/ui component patterns and Tailwind CSS classes. The user is managing tasks and projects. Generate kanban boards, task lists, timeline views, status dashboards, and detail panels as appropriate. Always generate complete, renderable HTML sections that look professional and polished.

entry-point.name: Project Hub
entry-point.auto_generate_query: Show the project hub dashboard with project overview cards, recent activity, task statistics, and quick navigation links.

routes_to.label: View Board
routes_to.description: Link to the kanban board view when showing project overviews or task summaries

routes_to.label: View Task
routes_to.description: Link to a specific task detail page when showing task lists or cards

board.name: Kanban Board
board.auto_generate_query: Show the kanban board with columns for each status: To Do, In Progress, In Review, and Done. Show task cards in each column.

routes_to.label: View Task
routes_to.description: Link to a specific task detail page from the board

routes_to.label: Project Hub
routes_to.description: Link back to the project hub dashboard

task-detail.name: Task Detail
task-detail.auto_generate_query: Show the task detail page with full description, status, priority, assignee, due date, tags, and project info.

routes_to.label: Back to Board
routes_to.description: Link back to the kanban board

routes_to.label: Project Hub
routes_to.description: Link back to the project hub dashboard
